recentTweets.text:
Happy birthday, America 🇺🇸🎉
Don’t listen to the haters: for 250 years old, you look and are AMAZING. 
♥️♥️♥️♥️🤍🤍🤍🤍💙💙💙💙
Thank God Kamala Harris is not our president.
When Tucker Carlson and Rashida Tlaib and Thomas Massie object together, you know Donald Trump is doing something right.
Thought exactly the same. No news alerts. Nothing. The murderer of half a million souls flees his countries, and the media is like, meh.

They shall grow not old, as we that are left grow old: Age shall not weary them, nor the years condemn. At the going down of the sun and in the morning We will remember them.
🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇦🇺

If hating on America and Americans is the answer of the far left to yesterday’s Trump victory — and I’m seeing tons of this on the socials - then they will keep losing elections. The vast majority of Americans are good people striving for a better life. 🇺🇸
.⁦@CBSNews⁩ Producer in Gaza Has History of Antisemitic, Anti-Israel Commentary: ‘Are Jews Really Human Like Us?’  https://t.co/dJ2FGubP1B
“6 dead hostages,” ⁦@nytimes⁩? If your children had been murdered by terrorists after months of torture, would the word suffice? Shame on you. https://t.co/Dlth4bTUV0
This was easy. Kamala f-ed it up.
This is an outrage. This woman ahas denied the Holocaust, and questioned the events of October 7. She is an antisemite and a scumbag. Shame on the Trump campaign. https://t.co/781Phhbyn8
Well there went even a chance of my vote.
Watching in real time reporters who have spent years shilling for Biden go from saying this is a “hinge moment” in the election to this is a debate “only for political diehards”
Of course he does. We focus on the Squad obsessively, but Murphy and Van Hollen are their quieter helpers in the Senate.

But arming Israel to defeat a terrorist organization that holds American hostages, that has killed Americans, and that seeks to annihilate all of Israel -  that’s a bloody red line? How can any self respecting American patriot & lover of democracy not be ashamed by this man?

The betrayal of rhe Ukrainian people as VP in 2014. The betrayal of Iraq in. 2011. The betrayal of Afghanistan to the Taliban as President. The deliberate facilitation of Iranian oil sales to China. The slow rolling of arms to Ukraine. The rehabilitation of Venezuela. 2/

Many have expressed the same sentiments, but let’s just review the bidding on @JoeBiden’s foreign policy principles. Tens of billions to Iran while VP. Arms to Saudi to fight Yemen whole VP. The betrayal of the Syrian people & sell out to Russia as VP. 1/
Said it two days ago. Saying it again. Kudos to @SpeakerJohnson. This is what leadership looks like. 🇺🇸
See Ivy League, it’s not hard to do the right thing. Let ⁦@VanderbiltU⁩ President Diermeier be your guide. https://t.co/chExEq4Avs

*No candle lightings. Too “controversial”
*Don’t wear Jewish signs - ✡️ or kippot. Too dangerous. 
*Don’t advertise your shop’s Jewishness. Too risky. 
* Don’t fly that Israeli flag. Too provocative. 
*Don’t support Israel. Too “colonialist.”

Feels like 1935. What’s next?

The US needs to stop subsidizing the @UN’s pervasive anti-Israel bias.
My latest in ⁦@NRO⁩  https://t.co/FbokJNFdsz
Did Vivek just call Zelensky a Nazi? Did he just echo Putin on the “Russian speaking” lands in Ukraine? Wow.

I ask myself, when I was standing up for the HALF MILLION murdered by Russia, Iran, Hezbollah and Assad in #Syria, where were these stalwarts of freedom now peopling the streets of London and New York? 1/3
Let’s talk about the expulsion of Jews from #Egypt, shall we? https://t.co/asMJ0Afk6R
I feel I speak for everyone in Washington when I say, STFU

The war in Israel: 
This was *the plan*. This is *how* it was planned. This piece was notionally titled “the coming war” last week. War came, and it’s bigger than we now see. Thanks to my wonderful editors ⁦@ForeignPolicy⁩ for getting it out. https://t.co/vEufuFcYpJ

A quick piece on the attack on #Israel 

It Is Time to Talk Seriously About #Iran.  Really.  https://t.co/bCO6KWzlfa
So terribly sorry to see @Liz_Cheney lose her race. She is a principled and honorable woman, and the @gop will be a lesser party without her.
Arizona Republicans Should Reject Kari Lake https://t.co/vD8V7CZDUI
Great piece by @BjornLomborg 👇🏼How the Climate Elite Spread Misery https://t.co/RZ9z3L8Gxi
As the Biden Administration condemns Russian tyranny, this is happening in #Iran, the state Team Biden is planning to hand billions when they "return" to the Iran deal.
Everything you wanted to know about the @un in one headline. #northkorea  https://t.co/VGwf2vZjjn

As if it was yesterday…To all those who have given so much - on that fateful #September11 and in the years since - thank you to their families, their loved ones and to each and every one. May their memories be a blessing. https://t.co/8dMgBcIBzF
Former Amb. Ryan Crocker joined me and  @marcthiessen for our podcast — up tomorrow. But one word he used to describe Biden administration policy comes back to me again and again. “Contemptible."
Are we bogged down in Germany? Italy? Spain? South Korea? Japan? Then what the hell are you talking about @JoeBiden?
I suppose if you can make it to the White House having been consistently wrong about everything, there’s no reason to believe you’ve screwed up.

It seems anomalous for the President to focus on mourning deaths that were caused by his own amoral and irresponsible decisions — decisions that were entirely unnecessary, and executed with historic incompetence.
So what were we doing in #afghanistan - with no combat casualties over the last year? We were keeping this from happening.
Everyone should read this: Will @JoeBiden  Grant My Daughter Justice?, by @bariweiss https://t.co/s58W5FjWbZ
A new book lays out what #Iran has really been up to in its nuclear program. Note to Team #Biden: it’s not good. My latest in @thedispatch https://t.co/QjJehWgCkY

.@WSJopinion is too kind. They say ousting  @Liz_Cheney  from the House GOP leadership for telling the truth about the 2020 election would "diminish" the @GOP. This is a disgrace, an extention of the outrage of Jan 6. Shame on anyone who is part of this. https://t.co/bNvFN9oyg5
‘It’s Not Difficult to Win an Election When Your Opponents Are Not on the Ballot’ - my conversation with ⁦@vkaramurza⁩ in ⁦@thedispatch⁩  https://t.co/pOhs5tpnLf

#Putin is weak, the #Russian people deserve better, and the West needs to stop shielding Russian kleptocrats’ stolen billions. Listen as ⁦@vkaramurza⁩ joins me and ⁦@marcthiessen⁩ for another #WhattheHellisGoingOn  https://t.co/MjPmESlNGN

A #Chinese court sentenced Zhang Zhan to prison for “picking quarrels and provoking trouble,” but her real offense was telling the truth about the government’s early mishandling of #Covid. https://t.co/Uuxb5xj1ir
Wow. And kudos to the Trump team for this, the fourth Arab-Israeli peace of the administration. 🇲🇦 🇺🇸 🇮🇱

Fascinating piece, but it perpetuates the myth that #Iran and #alQaeda do not have a cooperative relationship. Senior AQ figures have regularly lived in and transited Iran.

Al Qaeda’s No. 2, Accused in U.S. Embassy Attacks, Is Secretly Killed in Iran https://t.co/QKrdqTbG5W
Californians voted down Prop. 16. This rejection of identity politics should echo around America, not least at the U.S. Supreme Court.  https://t.co/l7zMvQYEve

Honestly, whether the money is wasted on a D or an R victory/loss, isn’t this a disgrace? Shouldn’t there be a better option? I get the need to protect 1st amendment rights, but doesn’t it break your heart to think what better service this money could have been put to?
I don’t understand. Trump isn’t president there.
Incredible.  https://t.co/Z0DTfClTbQ

I was ready to believe the press's "roid rage" narrative for why @realDonaldTrump walked from the stimulus talks. But here's the backstory: "Our sources say the White House’s final offer was in the range of $1.6 trillion, but Mrs. Pelosi wouldn't take it." https://t.co/KTM8xNZmy9
For all those crapping all over Chris Wallace, I gotta say, I have no idea who would have been able to manage this deathmatch.

Does anyone know what the word “fascist” means anymore? Does anyone remember what a real fascist dictator looks like? Because if they did, they would stop demeaning and dismissing the victims of real fascism by using the word casually to dismiss politicians they dislike.
Ignorance of history is a huge part of our problem: Nearly two-thirds of US young adults unaware 6m Jews killed in the #Holocaust https://t.co/8cRgZmTa2C
Perhaps you should read and consider rather than emoting. Not all life is television. There is plenty of grotesque to go around.

We throw these words around so easily these days: Hero. Victim. But on this date 19 years ago, there were true heroes. And too many victims. We all came together in the face of that horror. Today, put yourself aside and remember them. https://t.co/L0tqkvVm4w
What a disgrace.

Last I checked, we were a democracy, not a monarchy and @LizCheney was a principled member of the House. Mr. Gaetz should heed the words of that great Republican, Abraham Lincoln, that it is "better to remain silent and be thought a fool than to speak and to remove all doubt."
“I must err on the side of compassion.” - how many make this choice? Too few. Kudos to Christian Cooper.  https://t.co/czIm1H3uAF
Trump has directed the Pentagon to remove thousands of U.S. troops from Germany by September ... because he apparently thinks we’re there as a favor to them. 🙄 https://t.co/48kaOyDl2O
On the #WhattheHell podcast, @marcthiessen and I talked to @tedcruz this week — #GeorgeFloyd #China, #Iran and more. Listen here https://t.co/DuXxQwRFiF… @AEI_WTHIGO https://t.co/VnHzGaU67Y

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 7 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Danielle Pletka. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Syria / Rojava, Iraq / Baghdad / Kirkuk, Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 3 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 1 energy/economic hit in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2024-05-09T01:17:38Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.

Every Friday morning I get stuck behind the garbage truck. And every Friday morning, I am so full of admiration for the guys who work that demanding and stinky job with a smile on their face and a friendly wave. Just a positive thought to start the day.
